description: This established coin-operated laundromat is located in a busy suburban strip mall with high foot traffic. The business generates an annual gross revenue of $50,000 with a net cash flow of $18,000 after expenses. It features 20 washers and 20 dryers, all in good working condition, with some machines recently updated. Rent for the space is $1,200/month with a 5-year lease in place. The business operates with minimal owner involvement, with one part-time employee handling basic maintenance and cleaning. This is a turnkey operation ideal for a first-time buyer or as a passive income source.
seller_motivation: Owner is retiring after 13 years of successful operation and wishes to spend more time with family.

description: This vending machine route includes 15 high-traffic locations such as offices, schools, and gyms. The route generates $30,000 in annual gross revenue with a net cash flow of $12,000 after expenses for product and minimal maintenance. Machines are a mix of snack and drink dispensers, with an average age of 5 years. The business requires approximately 10-15 hours per week to restock and service machines, making it ideal for a part-time owner or as a side business. All location contracts are transferable to the new owner.
seller_motivation: Seller is moving out of state due to family reasons and can no longer manage the route.

description: This small laundromat is located in a densely populated urban neighborhood with consistent customer demand. A great opportunity for someone looking to enter the laundromat industry with a low upfront investment.

description: This vending route consists of 10 machines placed in strategic locations including warehouses, community centers, and small offices. description: This vending machine route in suburban Florida consists of 10 machines placed in high-traffic locations such as offices, schools, and gyms. Charming flower shop located in a small New England town, established in 1988. The business generates $35,000 in annual revenue with a cash flow of $12,000. Great opportunity for someone passionate about floristry to step into a turnkey operation.
